name: Notification toast (Vue 3)
algorithm: Toasts in a reactive array slide in via TransitionGroup; each entering toast arms a per-toast auto-dismiss timer. Hover/focus pauses the timer (so it can be read and the close button reached); leaving resumes it. Dismissal removes the toast through update:toasts and emits dismiss; the absolute leave-state lets the stack close its gap.
reduced_motion: Slide/fade enter-leave transition removed under prefers-reduced-motion; toasts appear and disappear instantly.
responsive_behaviour: fixed to a configurable corner, capped at min(28rem, 100vw - 2rem); region pointer-events none with toasts re-enabling pointer events
accessibility: role=status per toast; aria-live polite for info/success/warning and assertive for errors; never steals focus; close button has descriptive aria-label; type shown by border+icon+text; 44px targets.
